title: agropyron repens var. koeleri
intro: Agropyron repens var. koeleri, commonly known as creeping couch grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron repens var. koeleri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Agropyron repens var. koeleri can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
